## Thesis / aim

Frames **US–Iran** pause / **Islamabad** diplomacy as unlikely to end a longer **empire-maintenance** arc; foregrounds **refinery-fire** cluster narrative, **ship-boarding** incident, **Rick Scott** “worth it if China loses Middle East oil,” **Karoline Leavitt** “feeling based on facts,” **wartime economy** (Defense Production Act, draft registration, Pentagon budget lines), **Congress** vote “theater,” and extended **January 2026 National Defense Strategy** reading with Jiang commentary on **choke points** (Hormuz, Malacca, Panama, Gibraltar, Greenland), **China** **first island chain**, **Russia** **North–South / BRI** centrality of Iran, **short-term win / long-term nationalism–corruption–division** collapse thesis, **ICE** / **Operation Stargate** surveillance speculation.

## Next step
